ideas.idea: Use photo recognition as first concrete fitness function / test domain for the system
Genetic algorithm operates on rule graphs — mutation and crossover of rule structure, not just rule values. Stronger than standard GAs which evolve values within fixed representation.
Grammar over rule space — impose hierarchy or grammar on rules so rule space itself has navigable structure rather than being flat.

Dataset recommendation for training: start with MNIST (simple, clean labels, interpretable patterns, fast iteration), then step up to CIFAR-10 for colour and texture complexity. Key requirement: clean confident labels are critical since the empirical library builds entries from label-correlated subgraph occurrences — noisy labels corrupt the library at the foundation. Avoid web-scraped datasets for early training.
